title: VMRay Platform
description: VMRay provides advanced threat analysis and detection using an agentless hypervisor-based sandbox with real-time analysis capabilities. This connector ingests and correlates VMRay analysis data into OpenCTI, including IOCs, VMRay Threat Identifiers (VTIs), and MITRE ATT&CK techniques extracted from sandbox analysis results, enabling faster detection and response workflows.
short_description: Imports VMRay sandbox analysis results into OpenCTI, including IOCs, VTIs, and MITRE ATT&CK techniques for threat correlation and response.
